title: Fix grep -i multi-file/recursive inconsistency
description: Fix grep -i case-insensitive inconsistency in multi-file/recursive path. Currently -i works in pipe/streaming paths but multi-file/recursive passes empty string to fs.grep() and post-filters, causing inconsistent -l/-c behavior. Acceptance: grep -i -l and grep -i -c produce correct results across all code paths (single file, multi-file, recursive, piped).
